text: lenses worn in frames to improve or protect vision
original_text: Glasses are lenses worn in frames to improve or protect vision.

text: prescription glasses correct vision by bending light before it reaches the eyes
original_text: Prescription glasses correct vision by bending light before it reaches the eyes.

text: glasses can help with nearsightedness, farsightedness, astigmatism, or reading
original_text: Glasses can help with nearsightedness, farsightedness, astigmatism, or reading.

text: glasses can also be used for sun protection, safety, style, or screens
original_text: Glasses can also be used for sun protection, safety, style, or screens.
The meatball considers glasses tiny windows for eyeballs.
